event.description:
**NOTE: [Scale By the Bay](https://scale.bythebay.io) CFP is open through 6/16!**

**Update**: the *Community Showcase* is open! Apply to get a table to present to the attendees or do a lightning talk at the *LLM Open Mike*:

[https://chief.sc/llma23showcase](https://chief.sc/llma23showcase)

I'm really happy to announce the [#LLMs](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=llms&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) Avalanche [#meetup](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=meetup&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) that we will be running in conjunction with [#DataAISummit](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=dataaisummit&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280) on June 26th, at 5 pm at [The Contemporary Jewish Museum](https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-contemporary-jewish-museum/) (right next to [Moscone Center](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosconecenter/)).

We have some amazing technical LLM panelists and speakers from [Anthropic](https://www.linkedin.com/company/anthropicresearch/), [Google DeepMind](https://www.linkedin.com/company/googledeepmind/), [MosaicML](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaicml/), [Robust Intelligence](https://www.linkedin.com/company/robust-intelligence/), [Claypot AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/claypotai/), [John Snow Labs](https://www.linkedin.com/company/johnsnowlabs/), [LangChain](https://www.linkedin.com/company/langchain/), [Numbers Station AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/numbers-station-ai/), [LlamaIndex](https://www.linkedin.com/company/llamaindex/), [#Lamini](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=lamini&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280), [IBM](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ibm/), and [Databricks](https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks/)! And there will be more announced shortly!

Join the fun and festivities and donate to a great cause, too!

The first wave of speakers include:

* [Aakanksha Chowdhery, Ph.D.](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAANWasEBiJ-k6HKnicOQ5pS67GiwJoLEqtM) ([Google DeepMind](https://www.linkedin.com/company/googledeepmind/) )
* [Yaron Singer](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAONcoIB-1uAsEq07uowfjWbAk9eU6N0jVU) ([Robust Intelligence](https://www.linkedin.com/company/robust-intelligence/))
* [Chip Huyen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAIQAJQBE3ykLNnsOPVvxwuuVCOir2zAjOQ) ([Claypot AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/claypotai/))
* [David Talby](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAAF4lwB0Y0POGqLLdoouEIVOCs9fbitCvA) ([John Snow Labs](https://www.linkedin.com/company/johnsnowlabs/))
* [Emmanuel Ameisen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAABJ2inMBxjvt051XU2W69E3lyT-Yg_LuqUc) ([Anthropic](https://www.linkedin.com/company/anthropicresearch/))
* [Hanlin Tang](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAD0PIgB18iyBCXxzp-zsKubSiHLomy942U) ([MosaicML](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaicml/))
* [Harrison Chase](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAB06lJkB2-hiC0mqJ2yHgFtnAbf4UFXQ4Dg) ([LangChain](https://www.linkedin.com/company/langchain/))
* [Ines Chami](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAABIrxPABWm6CgJIIcVzkUzv-UlwvVnAUhhM) ([Numbers Station AI](https://www.linkedin.com/company/numbers-station-ai/))
* [Jerry Liu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAA9C_5MBsb5dPQ5at3QKbGwJ6-V5xHcsvUg) ([LlamaIndex](https://www.linkedin.com/company/llamaindex/))
* [Matei Zaharia](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAABOOU0BtyysgsFLGMD2iLUdQvjqj0U2esU) ([Databricks](https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks/))
* [Sandeep Gopisetty](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAABIBDwBvL8YFMoRikIaC2pGWhivncyIPVQ) ([IBM](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ibm/))
* [Sharon Zhou, PhD](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAxQCnUBXDiXgsm4d1qr1LHwgG37tqFQ6l0) ([#Lamini](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=lamini&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280))

From your organizers:
[Demetrios Brinkmann](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAA0CKbwBIwr0zMw0Vaxa_v8zjbnJLBDja28) ([#mlopscommunity](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/hashtag/?keywords=mlopscommunity&highlightedUpdateUrns=urn%3Ali%3Aactivity%3A7074484548721377280)), [Alexy Khrabrov](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ACoAAAAvviEBxmwxaQvRiRXr-dRnhZDzMaHpYCY), [Denny Lee](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dennyglee/)!

You have to register at [avalanche.fm](https://avalanche.fm) in order to attend. The RSVPs ar elimited.
event.title: LLM Avalanche
